request.description:
StartFragment

### **Admin Post List (****`GET /admin/list`****)**

This endpoint supports filtering, searching, and pagination.

#### **A. Get All Posts (Default)**

- **Scenario:** Loads the initial table (Page 1).
    
- **URL:** `{{baseUrl}}/sell-posts/admin/list`
    

Bash

```
curl --location 'http://localhost:3000/sell-posts/admin/list?page=1&limit=10' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_TOKEN>'

 ```

#### **B. Filter by Status (Pending Review)**

- **Scenario:** Admin clicks the "Pending Review" card to see only those posts.
    
- **Query:** `status=PAYMENT_PENDING_REVIEW`
    

Bash

```
curl --location 'http://localhost:3000/sell-posts/admin/list?status=PAYMENT_PENDING_REVIEW' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_TOKEN>'

 ```

#### **C. Filter by Service Type (Complex Filter)**

- **Scenario:** Show posts that requested "Pentagraph Map" verification.
    
- **Query:** `serviceType=pentagraph_map`
    

Bash

```
curl --location 'http://localhost:3000/sell-posts/admin/list?serviceType=pentagraph_map' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_TOKEN>'

 ```

#### **D. Search (Multi-field)**

- **Scenario:** Admin types "Rahman" or a specific "Post ID" in the search bar.
    
- **Query:** `search=Rahman`
    
- **Logic:** Searches `post.id`, `post.title`, and `seller.fullName`.
    

Bash

```
curl --location 'http://localhost:3000/sell-posts/admin/list?search=Rahman' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_TOKEN>'

 ```

#### **E. Combined Filter (Advanced)**

- **Scenario:** Searching for "Flat" properties in "Active" status on Page 2.
    
- **Query:** `status=ACTIVE&propertyType=Flat&page=2`
    

Bash

```
curl --location 'http://localhost:3000/sell-posts/admin/list?status=ACTIVE&propertyType=Flat&page=2&limit=10' \
--header 'Authorization: Bearer <ADMIN_TOKEN>'

 ```

**Expected Response (JSON):**

JSON

```
{
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "uuid-post-1",
            "title": "5 Katha Plot in Sector 4",
            "status": "ACTIVE",
            "askingPrice": 20000000,
            "division": "Dhaka",
            "district": "Dhaka",
            "servicesProgress": "2/3", // <--- 2 assignments completed out of 3 requested
            "seller": {
                "id": "uuid-seller-1",
                "name": "Mr. Rahman",
                "phone": "+88017...",
                "photoUrl": "..."
            },
            "createdAt": "2026-02-18T10:00:00.000Z"
        }
    ],
    "meta": {
        "total": 50,
        "page": 1,
        "limit": 10,
        "totalPages": 5
    }
}

 ```

EndFragment

request.description:
## Get Agent Schedules List

Retrieves a paginated list of agent appointment schedules for the Super Admin. Supports multiple filter combinations using `GetAdminAgentSchedulesDto`.

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a **Super Admin Bearer Token** (`{{superAdmin_token}}`).

---

### 📋 Filter Scenarios

#### A. Default Request _(No Filters)_

Fetches the first page of 10 results, sorted by the nearest appointment date.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/property-services/appointments/agent-schedules

 ```

---

#### B. Pagination Only

Fetches page 2, with 5 items per page.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/property-services/appointments/agent-schedules?page=2&limit=5

 ```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| `limit` | number | Items per page (default: 10) |

---

#### C. Filter by Status

Fetches only appointments with a specific status.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/property-services/appointments/agent-schedules?status=SCHEDULED

 ```

| `status` Value | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `SCHEDULED` | Appointments that are confirmed |
| `COMPLETED` | Appointments that have been done |
| `CANCELED` | Appointments that were cancelled |
| `RESCHEDULED` | Appointments moved to a new time |

---

#### D. Filter by Property Type

Fetches schedules for a specific type of property.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/property-services/appointments/agent-schedules?propertyType=Flat

 ```

| `propertyType` Value | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Flat` | Apartment/Flat |
| `Plot` | Land/Plot |
| `Commercial` | Commercial property |

---

#### E. Filter by Location _(City / District / Upazila)_

Filters schedules based on the property's address.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/property-services/appointments/agent-schedules?location=Banani

 ```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `location` | string | City, district, or upazila name to filter |

---

#### F. Search Functionality

Searches for matches in **Service Name**, **Agent Name**, or **Property Title**.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/property-services/appointments/agent-schedules?search=Karim

 ```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `search` | string | Keyword to search across service, agent, or property |

---

#### G. All-in-One Mega Filter

Tests pagination, status, property type, location, and search simultaneously.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/property-services/appointments/agent-schedules?page=1&limit=10&status=SCHEDULED&propertyType=Plot&location=Dhaka&search=Sahil

 ```

---

### ✅ Query Parameters Summary

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | number | No | 1 | Page number for pagination |
| `limit` | number | No | 10 | Number of results per page |
| `status` | string | No | — | Filter by appointment status |
| `propertyType` | string | No | — | Filter by property type (Flat, Plot, Commercial) |
| `location` | string | No | — | Filter by city, district, or upazila |
| `search` | string | No | — | Search by service name, agent name, or property title |

---

### 📦 Expected Response _(Default Request — Scenario A)_

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "uuid-assign-123",
      "timeAndDate": "2026-02-23T14:00:00.000Z",
      "property": {
        "id": "uuid-post-1044",
        "displayId": "#POST-1044A1",
        "title": "Banani Block-C",
        "image": "https://example.com/property1.jpg"
      },
      "serviceType": {
        "name": "Pentagraph Map",
        "displayId": "#SERV-892B"
      },
      "assignedAgent": {
        "id": "uuid-agent-44",
        "name": "Surveyor Karim",
        "phone": "+880 1711-2091XX",
        "photoUrl": "https://example.com/agent1.jpg",
        "designation": "surveyor"
      },
      "status": "SCHEDULED"
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "total": 5,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}

 ```

---

### 🔁 Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `success` | boolean | Whether the request was successful |
| `data[].id` | string | Unique ID of the schedule assignment |
| `data[].timeAndDate` | string | ISO 8601 datetime of the appointment |
| `data[].property.id` | string | Property post ID |
| `data[].property.displayId` | string | Human-readable property display ID |
| `data[].property.title` | string | Title of the property |
| `data[].property.image` | string | URL of the property image |
| `data[].serviceType.name` | string | Name of the service type |
| `data[].serviceType.displayId` | string | Human-readable service display ID |
| `data[].assignedAgent.id` | string | Agent's unique ID |
| `data[].assignedAgent.name` | string | Agent's full name |
| `data[].assignedAgent.phone` | string | Agent's phone number |
| `data[].assignedAgent.photoUrl` | string | URL of the agent's profile photo |
| `data[].assignedAgent.designation` | string | Agent's role/designation |
| `data[].status` | string | Current status of the appointment |
| `meta.total` | number | Total number of matching records |
| `meta.page` | number | Current page number |
| `meta.limit` | number | Number of items per page |
| `meta.totalPages` | number | Total number of pages |

request.description:
## Get Service Requests List — Filter Scenarios

This endpoint retrieves a paginated list of service requests for admin use. Below are all supported query parameter combinations based on `GetAdminServiceRequestsDto`.

---

### A. Default Request (No Filters)

Fetches the first page of 10 results, sorted by newest.

- **Method:** `GET`
    
- **URL:** `http://localhost:3000/property-services/service-requests`
    

---

### B. Pagination Only

Fetches page 2, with 5 items per page.

- **Method:** `GET`
    
- **URL:** `http://localhost:3000/property-services/service-requests?page=2&limit=5`
    

---

### C. Filter by Status

Fetches only the requests that currently need an agent assigned.

- **Method:** `GET`
    
- **URL:** `http://localhost:3000/property-services/service-requests?status=PENDING_ASSIGNMENT`
    

Other common statuses to test: `IN_PROGRESS`, `SUBMITTED`, `COMPLETED`.

---

### D. Filter by Service Type

Fetches only the requests for a specific service (e.g., Document Organization).

- **Method:** `GET`
    
- **URL:** `http://localhost:3000/property-services/service-requests?serviceType=document_organization`
    

---

### E. Search Functionality

Searches for matches in **Service Name**, **Agent Name**, **District**, or **Upazila**.

- **Method:** `GET`
    
- **URL:** `http://localhost:3000/property-services/service-requests?search=Sahil`
    

Alternative test: `?search=Banani` (to test location search).

---

### F. Sort Order

Sorts the list by oldest first (`ASC`).

- **Method:** `GET`
    
- **URL:** `http://localhost:3000/property-services/service-requests?sort=ASC`
    

---

### G. The "All-in-One" Mega Filter

Tests pagination, status filtering, type filtering, searching, and sorting all at the same time.

- **Method:** `GET`
    
- **URL:** `http://localhost:3000/property-services/service-requests?page=1&limit=10&status=IN_PROGRESS&serviceType=physical_estimate&search=Rahman&sort=DESC`
    

---

### Expected Minimal JSON Response (Default Request — Scenario A)

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "service": {
        "id": "uuid-assign-1",
        "displayId": "#SERV-892A",
        "name": "Document Organization"
      },
      "parentPost": {
        "id": "uuid-post-1044",
        "displayId": "#POST-1044",
        "location": "Banani Thana, Dhaka"
      },
      "assignedAgent": {
        "id": "uuid-agent-1",
        "name": "Sahil",
        "photoUrl": "https://example.com/agents/sahil.jpg"
      },
      "status": "SUBMITTED",
      "latestWorkLog": {
        "title": "Uploaded Final_Report_v2.pdf",
        "createdAt": "2026-02-22T17:19:58.000Z"
      }
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "total": 142,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "totalPages": 15
  }
}

 ```

---

### Query Parameters Summary

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | `number` | Page number (default: `1`) |
| `limit` | `number` | Items per page (default: `10`) |
| `status` | `string` | Filter by status: `PENDING_ASSIGNMENT`, `IN_PROGRESS`, `SUBMITTED`, `COMPLETED` |
| `serviceType` | `string` | Filter by service type (e.g., `document_organization`, `physical_estimate`) |
| `search` | `string` | Search by Service Name, Agent Name, District, or Upazila |
| `sort` | `string` | Sort order: `ASC` (oldest first) or `DESC` (newest first, default) |

request.description:
## GET Completed Services History (List & Filters)

Retrieves a paginated list of completed services for a specific agent. Supports filtering by search term, service type, sort order, and pagination using `GetAgentHistoryDto` query parameters.

**Base URL:** `{{localUrl}}/agents/admin/{{agentId}}/completed-services`

---

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| `limit` | number | Items per page (default: 10) |
| `search` | string | Search by Service ID or Post ID (e.g., `SERV893`, `1044`) |
| `serviceKey` | string | Filter by service category (e.g., `document_organization`, `pentagraph_map`, `ownership_history_validation`) |
| `sort` | string | Sort order: `ASC` (oldest first) or `DESC` (newest first, default) |

---

### Filter Combinations

#### A. Default Request (No Filters)

Fetches the first page of 10 completed services, sorted by the newest completion date.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/agents/admin/{{agentId}}/completed-services

 ```

---

#### B. Pagination Only

Fetches page 2, with 5 items per page.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/agents/admin/{{agentId}}/completed-services?page=2&limit=5

 ```

---

#### C. Search by Service ID or Post ID

Searches for a specific service ID (e.g., `#SERV893`) or property post ID (e.g., `#POST-1044`).

```
GET {{localUrl}}/agents/admin/{{agentId}}/completed-services?search=SERV893

 ```

---

#### D. Filter by Service Type

Fetches completed tasks only for a specific service category.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/agents/admin/{{agentId}}/completed-services?serviceKey=pentagraph_map

 ```

Possible `serviceKey` values:

- `document_organization`
    
- `pentagraph_map`
    
- `ownership_history_validation`
    

---

#### E. Sort Order (Oldest / Newest)

Sorts the list by the oldest completed tasks first.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/agents/admin/{{agentId}}/completed-services?sort=ASC

 ```

Use `sort=DESC` for newest first (default behavior).

---

#### F. The "All-in-One" Mega Filter

Tests pagination, searching, service type filtering, and sorting simultaneously.

```
GET {{localUrl}}/agents/admin/{{agentId}}/completed-services?page=1&limit=10&search=1044&serviceKey=ownership_history_validation&sort=DESC

 ```

---

### Expected JSON Response

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "serviceId": "#SERV893-POST-1044",
      "propertyPost": {
        "id": "uuid-post-1044",
        "title": "5 Katha Plot, Uttara Sector 7",
        "image": "https://example.com/property1.jpg"
      },
      "serviceType": "Legal Verification",
      "completionDate": "2026-02-20T10:00:00Z",
      "payoutStatus": "Paid",
      "earnedAmount": 1500
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "total": 12,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "totalPages": 2
  }
}

 ```

---

### Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `success` | boolean | Indicates if the request was successful |
| `data` | array | List of completed service records |
| `data[].serviceId` | string | Unique service identifier |
| `data[].propertyPost` | object | Associated property post details |
| `data[].propertyPost.id` | string | UUID of the property post |
| `data[].propertyPost.displayId` | string | Human-readable post ID |
| `data[].propertyPost.title` | string | Title of the property listing |
| `data[].propertyPost.image` | string | URL of the property image |
| `data[].serviceType` | string | Type/category of the completed service |
| `data[].completionDate` | string (ISO 8601) | Date and time the service was completed |
| `data[].payoutStatus` | string | Payment status (e.g., `Paid`, `Pending`) |
| `data[].earnedAmount` | number | Amount earned for the service |
| `meta.total` | number | Total number of matching records |
| `meta.page` | number | Current page number |
| `meta.limit` | number | Items per page |
| `meta.totalPages` | number | Total number of pages |

## Request Password Reset (Agent)

Allows an agent to request a password reset by submitting their registered phone number. This is a **public endpoint** — no authentication required.

### Request Body
| Field | Type   | Required | Description                        |
|-------|--------|----------|------------------------------------|
| phone | string | Yes      | Registered phone number of the agent |

### Response — 201 Created
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Password reset request submitted successfully. Awaiting admin approval."
}
```

### Notes
- The request will be queued for admin/super-admin review.
- No password change occurs until an admin approves and sets a new password.

## Get Reset Requests Summary

Returns a summary of password reset requests filtered by target role. Accessible by **Admin** or **Super Admin** only.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter  | Type   | Required | Description                                      |
|------------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| targetRole | string | Yes      | Role to filter by. Values: `agent`, `admin`      |

### Headers
| Key           | Value                  | Description              |
|---------------|------------------------|--------------------------|
| Authorization | Bearer {{adminToken}}  | Admin or Super Admin JWT |

### Response — 200 OK
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "pendingRequests": 5,
    "processedToday": 3,
    "totalActive": 8
  }
}
```

### Response Fields
| Field           | Type   | Description                                      |
|-----------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------|
| pendingRequests | number | Number of requests currently awaiting approval   |
| processedToday  | number | Number of requests processed today               |
| totalActive     | number | Total active (unresolved) reset requests         |

## Get Pending Requests List

Returns a paginated list of pending password reset requests. Accessible by **Admin** or **Super Admin** only.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter  | Type   | Required | Description                                         |
|------------|--------|----------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| page       | number | No       | Page number for pagination (default: 1)             |
| limit      | number | No       | Number of results per page (default: 10)            |
| targetRole | string | No       | Filter by role. Values: `agent`, `admin`            |
| search     | string | No       | Search by name or phone number                      |

### Headers
| Key           | Value                  | Description              |
|---------------|------------------------|--------------------------|
| Authorization | Bearer {{adminToken}}  | Admin or Super Admin JWT |

### Response — 200 OK
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "requests": [
      {
        "id": "req_abc123",
        "phone": "+8801711000000",
        "name": "Hasan Ahmed",
        "targetRole": "agent",
        "status": "PENDING",
        "createdAt": "2025-04-28T10:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "meta": {
      "total": 25,
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 10,
      "totalPages": 3
    }
  }
}
```

### Response Fields
| Field              | Type   | Description                                  |
|--------------------|--------|----------------------------------------------|
| requests           | array  | List of pending reset request objects        |
| requests[].id      | string | Unique ID of the reset request               |
| requests[].phone   | string | Phone number of the requester                |
| requests[].name    | string | Full name of the requester                   |
| requests[].targetRole | string | Role of the requester (`agent` or `admin`) |
| requests[].status  | string | Always `PENDING` in this list                |
| requests[].createdAt | string | ISO timestamp of when request was created  |
| meta.total         | number | Total number of matching records             |
| meta.page          | number | Current page number                          |
| meta.limit         | number | Results per page                             |
| meta.totalPages    | number | Total number of pages                        |

## Approve Request & Reset Password

Approves a pending password reset request and sets a new password for the user. Accessible by **Admin** or **Super Admin** only.

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Type   | Required | Description                          |
|-----------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------|
| requestId | string | Yes      | The ID of the password reset request |

### Headers
| Key           | Value                  | Description              |
|---------------|------------------------|--------------------------|
| Authorization | Bearer {{adminToken}}  | Admin or Super Admin JWT |

### Request Body
| Field    | Type   | Required | Description                                      |
|----------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| password | string | Yes      | The new password to set for the user             |

### Response — 200 OK
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Password has been reset successfully."
}
```

### Notes
- The password must meet the application's security requirements (minimum length, complexity, etc.).
- Once approved, the reset request is marked as processed and cannot be approved again.

## Reject Request

Rejects a pending password reset request. Accessible by **Admin** or **Super Admin** only.

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Type   | Required | Description                          |
|-----------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------|
| requestId | string | Yes      | The ID of the password reset request |

### Headers
| Key           | Value                  | Description              |
|---------------|------------------------|--------------------------|
| Authorization | Bearer {{adminToken}}  | Admin or Super Admin JWT |

### Request Body
None required.

### Response — 200 OK
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Password reset request has been rejected."
}
```

### Notes
- Once rejected, the reset request is marked as rejected and the user will need to submit a new request.
- The user is not automatically notified — notification logic depends on the backend implementation.

## Request Password Reset (Agent)

Allows an agent to request a password reset by submitting their registered phone number. This is a **public endpoint** — no authentication required.

### Request Body
| Field | Type   | Required | Description                        |
|-------|--------|----------|------------------------------------|
| phone | string | Yes      | Registered phone number of the agent |

### Response — 201 Created
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Password reset request submitted successfully. Awaiting admin approval."
}
```

### Notes
- The request will be queued for admin/super-admin review.
- No password change occurs until an admin approves and sets a new password.

## Get Reset Requests Summary

Returns a summary of password reset requests filtered by target role. Accessible by **Admin** or **Super Admin** only.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter  | Type   | Required | Description                                      |
|------------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| targetRole | string | Yes      | Role to filter by. Values: `agent`, `admin`      |

### Headers
| Key           | Value                  | Description              |
|---------------|------------------------|--------------------------|
| Authorization | Bearer {{adminToken}}  | Admin or Super Admin JWT |

### Response — 200 OK
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "pendingRequests": 5,
    "processedToday": 3,
    "totalActive": 8
  }
}
```

### Response Fields
| Field           | Type   | Description                                      |
|-----------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------|
| pendingRequests | number | Number of requests currently awaiting approval   |
| processedToday  | number | Number of requests processed today               |
| totalActive     | number | Total active (unresolved) reset requests         |

## Get Pending Requests List

Returns a paginated list of pending password reset requests. Accessible by **Admin** or **Super Admin** only.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter  | Type   | Required | Description                                         |
|------------|--------|----------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| page       | number | No       | Page number for pagination (default: 1)             |
| limit      | number | No       | Number of results per page (default: 10)            |
| targetRole | string | No       | Filter by role. Values: `agent`, `admin`            |
| search     | string | No       | Search by name or phone number                      |

### Headers
| Key           | Value                  | Description              |
|---------------|------------------------|--------------------------|
| Authorization | Bearer {{adminToken}}  | Admin or Super Admin JWT |

### Response — 200 OK
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "requests": [
      {
        "id": "req_abc123",
        "phone": "+8801711000000",
        "name": "Hasan Ahmed",
        "targetRole": "agent",
        "status": "PENDING",
        "createdAt": "2025-04-28T10:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "meta": {
      "total": 25,
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 10,
      "totalPages": 3
    }
  }
}
```

### Response Fields
| Field              | Type   | Description                                  |
|--------------------|--------|----------------------------------------------|
| requests           | array  | List of pending reset request objects        |
| requests[].id      | string | Unique ID of the reset request               |
| requests[].phone   | string | Phone number of the requester                |
| requests[].name    | string | Full name of the requester                   |
| requests[].targetRole | string | Role of the requester (`agent` or `admin`) |
| requests[].status  | string | Always `PENDING` in this list                |
| requests[].createdAt | string | ISO timestamp of when request was created  |
| meta.total         | number | Total number of matching records             |
| meta.page          | number | Current page number                          |
| meta.limit         | number | Results per page                             |
| meta.totalPages    | number | Total number of pages                        |
